description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the leapcode/ruby Docker image and includes a before_script which creates /var/cache/gitlab-runner if missing, changes its ownership to the cirunner user, and runs bundle install with parallel jobs excluding system_tests. Define a hidden job template .job_template that runs the commands: bundle exec rake lint (ignore failures), bundle exec rake syntax, bundle exec rake validate, and bundle exec rake spec. Add five test jobs—test:puppet37, test:puppet38_future_parser, test:puppet40, test:puppet45, and test:puppet4x—each inheriting the .job_template script and setting appropriate FACTER_VERSION and PUPPET_VERSION variables (and FUTURE_PARSER=yes for the puppet38 job). All jobs run in the default test stage. No artifacts, caches, or conditional rules are defined.
